description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish purse from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsBlack purse that has a zipped opening with an inner zipped pocket and two pockets on either sideOne zipped pocket on the front and a zipped pocket at the backStitch detailing and branding on the frontMaterial and CareGlossy synthetic and blended polyesterWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSize15.5 cm x 10 cmNo Warranty on Discounted Products
